coverage_goal: Collect national and regional eventing results for every FEI-affiliated National Federation, across every domestic class or level each federation publishes.

official_reference.name: FEI National Federations
official_reference.notes: The FEI National Federation database is the authoritative country list and supports lookup by country name or NOC code.

country_groups.name: All FEI member nations
country_groups.notes: Resolve the current country list dynamically from the FEI National Federation database when collecting data.

country_groups.name: All European FEI member nations
country_groups.notes: European country membership is intentionally resolved from FEI federation metadata instead of hard-coded in this repository.

event_level_groups.class_policy: Do not filter out domestic class names. Collect every published national, regional, grassroots, training, novice, intermediate, advanced, CCN, CNC, and federation-specific class code from each source.

national_results_output.notes: National crawlers should write normalized results here before consolidation with FEI and user-entered results.
